title: D1
excerpt: description: Wrangler commands for interacting with Cloudflare D1. image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/workers/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. Interact with [D1 databases](https://developers.cloudflare.com/d1/) service using Wrangler. Creates a new D1 database, and provides the binding and UUID that you will put in your config file
